title: Synthwave Police Box TARDIS
description: Synthwave TARDIS Datapack & Resource Pack for the AIT (Adventures in Time) Mod
body:
A small Datapack that Duzo (One of the Devs that worked on AIT) made to add my Synthwave Police Box TARDIS Exterior to the AIT (Adventures in Time) mod, just download it and put it in your Datapack and Resource Pack folders and make sure to have AIT and it's dependency installed, then it should be available as an option for changing TARDIS exterior, and feel free to edit the texture how you like to make it yours, i don't mind ;)

This data/resource pack adds a Synthwave/80's styled Police Box as an exterior option for the AIT (Adventures In Time) mod

This pack is meant for people who are interested in 80's styled content and i would recommend use of it for fans of the Synthwave genre/theme that are also users of the AIT mod

And as said at the top of the description, download & insert this pack into both the Resource Packs folder and Datapacks folder
